ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Annual budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job title */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the job title */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department to which the job title is most commonly associated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_titles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_departments" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the department */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the department */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role the employee had in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_job_titles" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started in the job title */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee stopped holding the job title */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating for the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive failed login attempts */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_history" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date of the login */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of the login */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the login occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for login */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "reset_date" TEXT /* Date of the password reset */,
  "reset_time" TEXT /* Time of the password reset */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Unique token generated for the password reset */,
  "token_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date and time for the reset token */,
  "reset_status" TEXT /* Status of the reset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department for which the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
